---
name: "answer-style"
description: "Guide concise technical responses. USE WHEN replies need direct, low-noise engineering prose."
---

# Guidance

## Rules

- Prefer short concrete sentences.
- Keep commands, paths, identifiers, and errors exact.
- Expand only when depth is requested or brevity would hide risk.

## Tool Use

- Use local repository evidence before making code claims.
- Report verification status when handing off changes.
